message: Completed BUGS_AND_IMPROVEMENTS.md: API layer now uses typed Depends (ContainerDep/ConfigDep) on every route instead of bare Request, ServiceContainer.set_config() owns config propagation, POST /config validates types/unknown keys (422 via coerce_config_update), UnsupportedMediaError gives the 415 envelope, shared TaskProgressResponse + response models for stable shapes (config blob/reports/preview stay dict[str,Any] by design since response_model drops unmodeled fields), /sorting/{id}/report now 404/409 not {}+200. CLI preview is task-based, cancel branches on status. Rationale: CLAUDE.md Hard Rules 1/3/6 + the review's documented decisions; chose per-field coercion over strict reject to tolerate JSON int/float.

Shipped real SigLIP 2 ONNX encoder (SiglipOnnxEncoder) for standard/max tiers, replacing the CLIP placeholder + 'not yet bundled' log. onnxruntime + Gemma tokenizer + lazy HF download (onnx-community/siglip2-base-patch16-256-ONNX), graceful CLIP fallback. Validated end-to-end (correct image-caption ranking on CoreML). Calibration: SigLIP cosines are narrower/lower than CLIP so it needs a HIGHER softmax temp (tagger_slope=40, categorize_scale=60 vs CLIP 100/40).

Decided AGAINST a React API generator for services/api.ts: the client is small and hand-crafted with Tauri/cross-cutting logic (port via invoke, withLoader counter, WS URL, thumbnail/diff URL builders, blob export) that codegen handles poorly, AND the highest-drift type (Config ~50 fields) is intentionally an untyped dict on the backend, so OpenAPI codegen cannot type it without undoing that backend choice. Drift is real (had to hand-add ai_model_tier/ai_allow_gpu) but better mitigated by a cheap contract test than a generator.

set_config now invalidates the cached encoder + AI services on ai_model_tier/ai_allow_gpu change so a UI tier switch takes effect; rebuild is lazy (worker thread) to avoid blocking model load on the event loop.

feat: Feature 4 (category name suggestions: POST /api/ai/suggest-categories, CategorySuggestionService with k-means+vocab, useAiSuggestions hook, FoldersSection Suggest button+chips), Feature 5 (video keyframe thumbnails in /api/thumbnail via extract_frame, PreviewGrid CSS grid view + PreviewList extraction, list/grid toggle in PreviewPanel), Bug fix: ChangedFromDefaults now scoped to active section (not global count), MediaPreviewModal renders tags as chips + category with folder icon

2026-06-23: Added CategorySuggestionService (pure-numpy k-means + 60-word vocab cosine match) + POST /api/ai/suggest-categories + useAiSuggestions hook + FoldersSection suggest-chip UI. Video keyframe thumbnails via extract_frame/probe_duration in GET /api/thumbnail. PreviewPanel decomposed into PreviewList+PreviewGrid+orchestrator with list/grid toggle. ChangedFromDefaults made per-section (not global). Tags/category shown as visual chips in MediaPreviewModal+PreviewGrid. 577 backend tests + 57 frontend tests green.

Fixed ConfigPanel TDZ mount crash (sectionFields used in useMemo before its const decl); added startup splash + pre-paint theme init in index.html; extracted buildFlatRows to lib/previewRows.ts (fixes CI-red react-refresh lint + adds 11 tests); enabled @typescript-eslint/no-use-before-define to guard the crash class; added docs/settings-reference.md. All frontend gates green.

Pass 2 backend sweep: (1) fixed PEP-604 union unwrap in _coerce_env_value — optional-int MEDIASORT_* env overrides were stored as strings and crashed the walk at sort time (types.UnionType is not typing.Union on py<=3.13); (2) switched TaskManager.cancel_task to cooperative cancel (event only, hard cancel only in shutdown) so a cancelled sort persists its partial operation to history and can't overlap a restarted sort — frontend already stops polling on cancel so no UI change; (3) removed dead POST /api/duplicates/scan + DuplicateService.find_duplicates + CLI client method — zero callers, and its traversal contradicted the sort's rules; (4) deleted analysis/ planning docs — their roadmap is done and their base file BUGS_AND_IMPROVEMENTS.md was deleted by the user

Rewrote docs/kb-*.md + CLAUDE.md hard rules to match the actual stack (raw sqlite3 DatabaseManager, dataclass Config + ConfigLoader, TestClient fixtures, cooperative cancel, snake_case /api no versioning) — they previously taught SQLAlchemy/Alembic/uv/JWT/Angular patterns this repo never had, which would mislead any AI assistant

P0 engine: destination-aware dedup index lives inside the destination (.mediasort-dedup-index.sqlite3) so it travels with the library; junk filter defaults OFF (behaviour changes are opt-in per repo convention); destination match outranks the deny-list because a deleted duplicate's kept original still lives in the library

UX-optimization pass (feat/ux-pass): removed delete-permanently dup action (quarantine-only now, aligns never-delete invariant); grouped settings rail into Setup/Cleanup/Extras; surfaced junk/already_in_destination statuses across preview+report+summary; replaced hardcoded palette colors with semantic tokens (+category token); a11y batch (focus-trap modals via useFocusTrap, aria-pressed/expanded/sort, labeled search inputs, inert locked config); virtualized PreviewGrid (300 files -> ~42-56 mounted cards) + O(1) breadcrumb; lazy-loaded History page. Verified end-to-end with Playwright on 300-file library.
